core_principles: Less is More: Remove all visual clutter
Typography as Art: Use massive, clean fonts
Motion with Purpose: Slow, deliberate reveals
Content is King: The video is the hero, text is the narrator

typography.heading_style: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-[0.9]
typography.subheading_style: text-sm md:text-lg font-light tracking-wide text-white/70 max-w-lg

layout_strategy.content_area: col-span-full md:col-span-8 lg:col-span-7 pl-6 md:pl-20 flex flex-col justify-center

changes_required: Remove Green WhatsApp Button (Use a subtle icon link instead)
Remove 'Gold Shimmer' animation from main text (Keep it static white or very subtle champagne)
Fix Video Loading Logic (Add poster image fallback)
Add 'Scroll for Luxury' indicator at bottom

ctas.style: h-12 px-8 bg-white text-black hover:bg-accent-champagne hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-500 rounded-none tracking-widest uppercase text-xs font-bold
h-12 px-6 text-white hover:text-accent-gold underline-offset-8 hover:underline decoration-1 transition-all duration-500 tracking-widest uppercase text-xs

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Rewrite HeroCurator.tsx to use a clean, semantic layout.
3. Implement the video background with the 'poster' attribute set to the fallback image URL to prevent black screen on load.
4. Use the 'Cinematic Asymmetry' layout: Content on the left, breathing room on the right.
5. Apply a 'Noise Overlay' div over the video to unify the aesthetic.
6. Replace the 3 buttons with the 2 defined in 'ctas' section.
7. Use Framer Motion for 'staggerChildren' on the text container (0.2s stagger).
8. Ensure the 'INTEGRATED LUXURY LIVING' text is split onto two lines for impact.
9. CRITICAL: Preserve the CMS data fetching logic (useEffect with BACKEND_URL) and the Bilingual (useLanguage) hooks. The new design must still support Arabic RTL and CMS text overrides.
10. Verify video paths exist (they do: /videos/hero-v3/...). Ensure the video tag has playsInline, autoPlay, muted, loop.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for the main heading text. Pure White is more premium.
Avoid 'button soup'. Maximum 2 actions per view.
Use generous padding (py-32 or more) to let the video breathe.
Ensure high contrast between text and video (use overlay gradients).
